accordion.title: Accordion
accordion.description: A collapsible accordion for showing and hiding content sections. Supports single and multiple item expansion.

demo.source:
import { Text } from "../Text/text";
import { Accordion } from "./accordion";

function AccordionDemo() {
	return (
		<Accordion.Root>
			<Accordion.Item value="item-1">
				<Accordion.Header>
					<Accordion.Trigger>What is Blenx UI?</Accordion.Trigger>
				</Accordion.Header>
				<Accordion.Panel>
					<Text variant="body2">
						Blenx UI is a modern React component library built with StyleX and
						Base UI.
					</Text>
				</Accordion.Panel>
			</Accordion.Item>
			<Accordion.Item value="item-2">
				<Accordion.Header>
					<Accordion.Trigger>How do I install it?</Accordion.Trigger>
				</Accordion.Header>
				<Accordion.Panel>
					<Text variant="body2">
						Install via the shadcn CLI with:{" "}
						<Text variant="code">npx shadcn@latest add button</Text>
					</Text>
				</Accordion.Panel>
			</Accordion.Item>
			<Accordion.Item value="item-3">
				<Accordion.Header>
					<Accordion.Trigger>Is it accessible?</Accordion.Trigger>
				</Accordion.Header>
				<Accordion.Panel>
					<Text variant="body2">
						Yes, all components are built on Base UI primitives with full ARIA
						support.
					</Text>
				</Accordion.Panel>
			</Accordion.Item>
		</Accordion.Root>
	);
}

export { AccordionDemo as Demo };

alert.title: Alert
alert.description: A contextual feedback banner with four visual variants: info, success, warning, and error.

alertdialog.title: Alert Dialog
alertdialog.description: A confirmation or alert modal dialog for critical user interactions requiring acknowledgment.

autocomplete.title: Autocomplete
autocomplete.description: A typeahead autocomplete input that filters suggestions as the user types. Built with Base UI Autocomplete.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: An avatar component with image and fallback support. Displays a user profile image or initials placeholder.

badge.title: Badge
badge.description: An inline badge or pill component with variant color presets for status, labels, and counts.

box.title: Box
box.description: A low-level polymorphic layout primitive. The foundational building block for all layout components.

breadcrumbs.title: Breadcrumbs
breadcrumbs.description: A breadcrumb navigation trail with ARIA support for hierarchical page navigation.

button.title: Button
button.description: A polymorphic button component with loading state, variant and size presets, full-width mode, and custom border radius. Built on Base UI useRender.

demo.source:
import { CaretRightIcon, PlayIcon } from "@phosphor-icons/react";
import { HStack, Stack, VStack } from "../Stack/stack";
import { Text } from "../Text/text";
import { Button } from "./button";

function ButtonDemo() {
	return (
		<VStack gap="medium">
			<Stack gap="small">
				<Text variant="h6">Variants</Text>
				<HStack wrap>
					<Button variant="primary">Primary</Button>
					<Button variant="secondary">Secondary</Button>
					<Button variant="outline">Outline</Button>
					<Button variant="ghost">Ghost</Button>
					<Button variant="link">Link</Button>
					<Button variant="danger">Danger</Button>
				</HStack>
			</Stack>

			<Stack gap="small">
				<Text variant="h6">Sizes</Text>
				<HStack wrap>
					<Button size="small">Small</Button>
					<Button size="medium">Medium</Button>
					<Button size="large">Large</Button>
				</HStack>
			</Stack>

			<Stack gap="small">
				<Text variant="h6">With Icons</Text>
				<HStack wrap>
					<Button>
						<PlayIcon />
						Play
					</Button>
					<Button variant="outline">
						Next
						<CaretRightIcon />
					</Button>
				</HStack>
			</Stack>
		</VStack>
	);
}

export { ButtonDemo as Demo };

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: A date calendar component built on react-day-picker. Supports single, range, and multiple date selection modes.

card.title: Card
card.description: A content card container with header, body, footer, title, and description sub-components.

checkbox.title: Checkbox
checkbox.description: A checkbox input with checked, indeterminate, and disabled states. Includes a CheckboxGroup wrapper for grouping.

colorpicker.title: Color Picker
colorpicker.description: A color picker inside a popover. Uses react-colorful with hex input and color swatch preview.

colorswatch.title: Color Swatch
colorswatch.description: A small inline color swatch square that displays a given color value.

combobox.title: Combobox
combobox.description: A combobox with single and multi-select (chip) support, built on Base UI Combobox with filtering and popup.

container.title: Container
container.description: A centered layout wrapper that constrains content width with configurable max-width presets.

datepicker.title: Date Picker
datepicker.description: A date picker built as a popover containing a calendar with formatted date display.

dialog.title: Dialog
dialog.description: A modal dialog with backdrop, header, footer, scroll panel, and mobile bottom sheet behavior.

demo.source:
import { Button } from "../Button/button";
import { HStack } from "../Stack/stack";
import { Text } from "../Text/text";
import {
	Dialog,
	DialogClose,
	DialogContent,
	DialogDescription,
	DialogFooter,
	DialogHeader,
	DialogPanel,
	DialogTitle,
	DialogTrigger,
} from "./dialog";

function DialogDemo() {
	return (
		<Dialog>
			<DialogTrigger render={<Button variant="outline" />}>
				Open Dialog
			</DialogTrigger>
			<DialogContent>
				<DialogHeader>
					<DialogTitle>Confirm Action</DialogTitle>
					<DialogDescription>
						Are you sure you want to proceed with this action?
					</DialogDescription>
				</DialogHeader>
				<DialogPanel>
					<Text variant="body2">
						This action cannot be undone. Please confirm your choice.
					</Text>
				</DialogPanel>
				<DialogFooter>
					<HStack gap="small" justify="end">
						<DialogClose render={<Button variant="ghost" />}>
							Cancel
						</DialogClose>
						<Button>Confirm</Button>
					</HStack>
				</DialogFooter>
			</DialogContent>
		</Dialog>
	);
}

export { DialogDemo as Demo };

drawer.title: Drawer
drawer.description: A swipeable drawer panel that slides in from any side. Supports nested menus, radio groups, and checkboxes.

field.title: Field
field.description: A form field wrapper with accessible label, description, error, and validity wiring for form controls.

grid.title: Grid
grid.description: A CSS Grid layout component with column presets, gap tokens, and alignment control. Includes a GridItem sub-component for spanning.

input.title: Input
input.description: A text input component with size presets, error state styling, and auto-generated IDs. Built on Base UI Input primitive.

inputgroup.title: Input Group
inputgroup.description: A compound form control group with addon, label, input, textarea, menu, checkbox, and radio sub-components.

menu.title: Menu
menu.description: A dropdown menu with items, separators, group labels, and shortcuts. Built on Base UI Menu.

popover.title: Popover
popover.description: A floating popover with trigger, positioning, arrow, backdrop, and accessible title/description.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: A progress bar with label, track, indicator, and value display. Built on Base UI Progress.

radio.title: Radio
radio.description: A radio button with RadioGroup wrapper for single-select option lists. Built on Base UI Radio primitive.

scrollarea.title: Scroll Area
scrollarea.description: A custom scroll area with scroll fade, scrollbar gutter reservation, and fill mode. Built on Base UI ScrollArea.

segmentedcontrol.title: Segmented Control
segmentedcontrol.description: A convenience wrapper around ToggleGroup providing a single-select segmented control with options array.

select.title: Select
select.description: A fully compound select component with trigger, popup, list, items, groups, scroll arrows, and a convenience SelectWrapper for forms.

demo.source:
import {
	SelectIcon,
	SelectItem,
	SelectList,
	SelectPopup,
	SelectPortal,
	SelectPositioner,
	SelectRoot,
	SelectTrigger,
	SelectValue,
} from "./select";

function SelectDemo() {
	return (
		<SelectRoot defaultValue="apple">
			<SelectTrigger>
				<SelectValue placeholder="Pick a fruit" />
				<SelectIcon />
			</SelectTrigger>
			<SelectPortal>
				<SelectPositioner>
					<SelectPopup>
						<SelectList>
							<SelectItem value="apple">Apple</SelectItem>
							<SelectItem value="banana">Banana</SelectItem>
							<SelectItem value="orange">Orange</SelectItem>
						</SelectList>
					</SelectPopup>
				</SelectPositioner>
			</SelectPortal>
		</SelectRoot>
	);
}

export { SelectDemo as Demo };

separator.title: Separator
separator.description: A visual divider supporting horizontal and vertical orientations with subtle and strong tone variants. Optionally labeled.

slider.title: Slider
slider.description: A range slider supporting single and multi-thumb values with orientation, min/max, and thumb alignment. Built on Base UI Slider.

spinner.title: Spinner
spinner.description: A loading spinner with ARIA role and label for accessible loading state indication.

splitter.title: Splitter
splitter.description: A resizable split panel layout with pointer and keyboard support, collapsible panels, and localStorage persistence.

stack.title: Stack
stack.description: A flexbox layout component with gap, alignment, and direction control. Includes VStack and HStack shorthands.

surface.title: Surface
surface.description: A background surface layer with variant presets for different visual depths. Supports interactive hover styles.

switch.title: Switch
switch.description: A toggle switch with thumb knob for on/off states. Built on Base UI Switch primitive.

table.title: Table
table.description: A styled table component with column definitions, row data, cell alignment, and optional row event handlers.

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: A tabbed navigation component with underline, ghost, and segmented variants. Built on Base UI Tabs.

demo.source:
import { VStack } from "../Stack/stack";
import { Text } from "../Text/text";
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsPanel, TabsTab } from "./tabs";

function TabsDemo() {
	return (
		<VStack gap="medium">
			<Tabs defaultValue="tab1">
				<TabsList>
					<TabsTab value="tab1">Overview</TabsTab>
					<TabsTab value="tab2">Usage</TabsTab>
					<TabsTab value="tab3">API</TabsTab>
				</TabsList>
				<TabsPanel value="tab1">
					<Text variant="body2">
						Welcome to the component overview. Here you will find a summary of
						features and capabilities.
					</Text>
				</TabsPanel>
				<TabsPanel value="tab2">
					<Text variant="body2">
						Usage examples and code snippets to help you integrate the component
						into your project.
					</Text>
				</TabsPanel>
				<TabsPanel value="tab3">
					<Text variant="body2">
						Detailed API reference including props, types, and methods.
					</Text>
				</TabsPanel>
			</Tabs>
		</VStack>
	);
}

export { TabsDemo as Demo };

text.title: Text
text.description: A polymorphic typography component with variant presets for headings, body text, and code. Supports color, alignment, and weight.

textarea.title: Textarea
textarea.description: A multi-line text input with size presets and numeric row control. Built on Base UI Field.Control.

toggle.title: Toggle
toggle.description: A two-state toggle button with variant and size presets. Built on Base UI Toggle.

togglegroup.title: Toggle Group
togglegroup.description: A group of toggle buttons with variant, size, and orientation control. Built on Base UI ToggleGroup.
